colosseum.title: Colosseum
colosseum.subtitle: Tier Dispute Voting
colosseum.description: Adjust product tiers through community voting.
colosseum.voteStep1: Select a product from the dispute list below
colosseum.voteStep2: Vote for upgrade or downgrade on the product detail page
colosseum.voteStep3: Votes are collected for one week and the admin adjusts the tier
colosseum.noDisputesDesc: There are no disputes currently in voting.
colosseum.howToRequestDesc: You can request a dispute through UP/DOWN voting on each product detail page. If 30 or more people support it, it will be registered in the Colosseum.
